records.title: AI-Based Retinal Disease Detection System Using Deep Learning 1. Problem Identification Retinal diseases such as Diabetic Retinopathy and Glaucoma can cause vision loss and blindness if not detected early. Currently, diagnosis is mostly done manually by ophthalmologists which is time-consuming and may not be easily accessible in rural areas. Therefore, there is a need for an automated system that can detect retinal diseases quickly and accurately using retinal fundus images. 2. Problem Solution The proposed system will use Deep Learning and Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) to automatically detect retinal diseases from fundus images. The system will preprocess retinal images, extract important features, and classify whether the patient has diabetic retinopathy, glaucoma, or a normal retina. Poor access to local service information 3. Main Features Upload retinal fundus images AI-based disease detection Detection of diabetic retinopathy and glaucoma Image preprocessing and feature extraction Fast and accurate predictions User-friendly web application Remote monitoring support 4.
records.proposed_solution: will use Deep Learning and Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) to automatically detect retinal diseases from fundus images. The system will preprocess retinal images, extract important features, and classify whether the patient has diabetic retinopathy, glaucoma, or a normal retina. Poor access to l...

records.target_users: User-friendly web application Remote monitoring support 4.
records.expected_impact: s The project will provide a smart AI-based healthcare system capable of detecting retinal diseases accurately and efficiently, helping in early diagnosis and prevention of blindness.

records.title: AI-Based Real -Time Weapon Detection System Using Thermal and RGB Image Fusion KEY WORDS: Artificial Intelligence, Computer Vision, YOLOv8, Thermal Imaging, RGB Fusion, Weapon Detection, Object Detection, Surveillance System DOMAIN OF THE PRODUCT: Artificial Intelligence, Computer Vision, Embedded Systems, Security & Surveillance SUPERVISOR’S NAME: Temur ul Hassan STUDENT INFORMATION Write in BLOCK LETTERS ONLY. Sr. Student ID Name Email Mobile .1 70138389 Arbaz Nasir Virk 70138389@student.uol. edu.pk 03235959583 2 70137013 Mukaram Ali Arshad 70137013@student.uol. edu.pk 0327 1140001 3 70138299 Arslan Anwar 70138299@student.uol.e du.pk 03035755858 Day Month Year DATE – – Note: Please read carefully “FYP Proposal Guidelines”, “Evaluation Form” & “Template Solution” before preparing FYP proposal. From this template remove all the guiding instruction before submitting the proposal including this text box too. The University of Lahore – Final Year Project Proposal Page 2 Please expand space according to answer 1- Problem Identification: Identify a real -world problem or a market gap that can be addressed through your project. This is the foundation of any entrepreneurial venture. In recent years, security threats involving weapons such as guns and knives have increased, creating a need for intelligent surveillance systems. Existing weapon detection systems mainly rely on RGB cameras, which perform poorly in low-light, foggy, or night-time environments. Additionally, many systems depend on expensive infrastructure and cloud-based processing, making them inaccessible for small-scale use. There is a clear need for a cost-effective, real-time weapon detection system that can operate reliably in all environmental conditions. This project addresses this gap by integrating thermal imaging with RGB cameras, enabling detection even in darkness or visually challenging scenarios. 1- Product Market Analysis: Conduct thorough market research to understand the
records.proposed_solution: The market for AI-based surveillance systems is rapidly growing, especially in areas such as: ⚫ Smart cities ⚫ Security agencies ⚫ Airports and public places ⚫ Educational institutions Existing solutions like enterprise surveillance systems are expensive and require advanced infrastructure. Research...

records.target_users: for this system include: ⚫ Security organizations The University of Lahore – Final Year Project Proposal Page 3 ⚫ Government agencies ⚫ Small institutions (schools, offices) ⚫ Private security firms T
